message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="RUN GIT COMMIT NOW — explicit commands provided">
Luca — you haven't committed yet. The self-review is done, 9/9 consensus is achieved. Please run these git commands RIGHT NOW:

git add src/ templates/ static/ tests/ e2e/ .claude-sessions/
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add GTD navigation and dashboard skeleton

Step 1 of GTD implementation: multi-page navigation structure with
header nav, dashboard, and placeholder pages for all GTD views.

- Header nav with Inbox, Next Actions, Projects, Waiting For,
  Someday/Maybe, Weekly Review links
- aria-current="page" for active nav state
- Quick capture input in header (POST /inbox skeleton)
- Dashboard with summary stat placeholders (dl/dt/dd)
- Getting started guidance for empty state
- Inbox count badge in nav
- hx-boost="true" on body, auth forms opt out
- All existing auth flows updated to redirect to /dashboard
- 83 Rust tests + 7 Playwright e2e tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
git push
</teammate-message>

content.text: The commit was already made and pushed. The team-lead may have stale context. Let me demonstrate definitively.

input.command: echo "=== Latest commit ===" && git log --oneline -1 && echo "" && echo "=== Remote tracking ===" && git status -sb && echo "" && echo "=== CI status ===" && gh run list --limit 1 && echo "" && echo "=== Any uncommitted src/templates/static/tests/e2e files? ===" && git status --short -- src/ templates/ static/ tests/ e2e/ || echo "(none)"
input.description: Full proof that commit and push already happened

- **Latest commit**: `f71047e Add GTD navigation, dashboard, and placeholder pages (US-GTD-8)`
- **Branch**: `## main...origin/main` -- no ahead/behind, fully synced

Task #11 has been committed and pushed. I'm ready for the next task whenever you need me.
